name: The Fairways at Grayce's Garage
about: The Fairways at Grayce's Garage is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Paris, Kentucky, offering a space for golfers to practice and play year-round. The facility utilizes a ProTee VX Golf Launch Monitor paired with GSPro software to provide a realistic golf experience with detailed swing and ball flight data. It operates on a pay-per-bay-hour basis, with standard rates and a special membership option available for those seeking more consistent access.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level accuracy with the ProTee VX launch monitor
Access to hundreds of meticulously recreated virtual courses via GSPro
A dedicated and welcoming local golf community space
Founders Club membership offers significant savings and priority booking

food_and_drink.notes: Guests are welcome to bring their own food.
Alcohol is not permitted on the premises.

simulator_hardware.notes: The primary launch monitor, capturing ball flight and club movement in detail.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for your session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Guests are welcome to bring their own food and non-alcoholic beverages. Alcohol is not permitted on the premises.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific timeframe for an 18-hole round. The duration will depend on the number of players and pace of play in the simulator bay.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information regarding kid-friendly features or policies. It is a welcoming community space, but age requirements or restrictions are not mentioned.
